properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: ai.service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the Python LangGraph/FastAPI AI service.

properties.name: ai.service.enabled
properties.description: When true, ChatbotService tries the Python LangGraph service first and falls back to Gemini on failure.
